    "Rebar size does not match placing drawing schedule - wrong bar diameter/deformation pattern installed",
    "Installed bar provides less or different cross-sectional area than specified, reducing structural capacity",
    "Defect identified at inspection step but not corrected prior to concrete placement"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work in affected area and prevent concrete placement until corrected",
    "Remove and replace incorrect bars with sizes specified in placing drawings",
    "Re-inspect after correction and document rework with third-party inspector",
    "Verify adjacent placements for same error pattern"
  ],
  "rationale": "The installed rebar does not match the bar size specified in the placing drawings and schedule. This is a structural non-compliance under ACI 318 because the wrong bar size changes the cross-sectional steel area, affecting load-carrying capacity, development length, and spacing requirements. Since the work has been inspected and the defect confirmed, the installation is defective and non-compliant, requiring correction before proceeding.",
  "references": ["ACI 318", "ACI 117", "placing drawings"]
}
